name: Chicken Giblet Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the giblets and discard all fat pieces. Place them in a large cooking pot with water and salt (if desired). Bring to a boil.
2. Simmer for about 25 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except the oatmeal, and simmer gently for an additional 30 minutes.
4. Remove the giblets and chop into small pieces.
5. Return the chopped giblets to the soup and add the oatmeal. Stir and simmer for 5 more minutes.
(Note: This recipe yields 6 servings. For low-sodium diets, omit salt and substitute unsalted tomato juice.)
